subtasks.description: Query SaaS/subscription database to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024), sorted in descending order by cost per seat. Include product name, total spend, active seat count, and calculated average cost per seat.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single SQL aggregation query requiring multi-table joins (likely: products, subscriptions/seats, and spend/cost tables) with GROUP BY and filtering for Q4 2024 timeframe. Mid tier is appropriate for moderate complexity (multi-table joins, aggregation, date filtering, sorting). No cross-source reconciliation needed—single relational database source. One subtask suffices as all metrics come from the same warehouse and can be computed in a single query with proper window functions or subqueries."

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, CASE WHEN SUM(daily_active_seats) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / SUM(daily_active_seats), 2) END AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC NULLS LAST
